# Promotion Pass — Release-Safe Sleeve Set (2026-04-19)

## Purpose

Record the first explicit sleeve-focused promotion pass from the private Resleever lane into the public UMG Block Library.

## Source lane

Private source:
- `artifacts/umg-envoy-agent-plugin/vendor/UMG_Envoy_Resleever/sleeves/library`

## Selected promotion set

This pass promoted a small deliberate set of sleeves judged strong enough for the first public-safe sleeve pass:
- `bank-audit-compliance`
- `business-automation-consultant`
- `idaho-grants-finder`
- `super-emulator-dev`
- `uo-server-developer`

## Why these were chosen

These sleeves were chosen because they were already identified as the strongest current derivative-friendly promotion candidates:
- clear purpose
- public-safe or shared-canonical leaning domain
- partial public structured support already present through promoted NeoBlocks, NeoStacks, or promoted MOLT artifacts
- no obvious generated/archive/runtime baggage in the curated sleeve folder surface used for this pass

## Public placement

### HUMAN-side sleeve packages
Readable sleeve folders were promoted into:
- `HUMAN/SLEEVES/categories/business/...`
- `HUMAN/SLEEVES/categories/finance/...`
- `HUMAN/SLEEVES/categories/coders/...`

This preserves readable surfaces such as:
- `README.md`
- `HOW-TO-USE.md`
- `STACKS.md`
- `MOLT-BLOCK-LIST.md`
- `GATE-LIST.md`

### AI-side sleeve surfaces
Structured sleeve-related files were promoted where present into:
- `AI/SLEEVES/categories/business/...`
- `AI/SLEEVES/categories/finance/...`
- `AI/SLEEVES/categories/coders/...`

Promoted AI-side file types included where present:
- `sleeve.json`
- `manifest.json`
- `neostacks.json`
- `neoblocks.json`
- `molt-blocks.json`
- `gates.json`

## What was not promoted in this pass

Still held back:
- `vrchat-developer` as an extra candidate beyond the initial five
- sleeves with unclear sensitivity or weaker current matching confidence
- investigative, journaling, nonprofit, internal/operator, generated, archive, runtime-derived, or unresolved private-only sleeve surfaces

## Outcome

This pass proves that sleeve promotion can be done intentionally and cleanly rather than only for structured block families.
It also makes the public Block Library more plugin-useful because sleeve-level AI-side and HUMAN-side content now exists for a first curated public-safe set.
